cases.prompt: Use $cautilus to test the local impl skill with the checked-in fixture and report the exact command path and recommendation.

Use $cautilus to run the checked-in dev/skill eval fixture with the fixture runtime and summarize the recommendation. This case checks Cautilus command routing, not model quality. The local skill surface is already installed; in a read-only agent runtime, use --skip-preflight and prefer /dev/shm/cautilus-skill-eval-smoke for the output dir when available.

Use $cautilus with no more task detail on this repo. Treat this as a first-touch orientation run: read the Cautilus status packet, summarize adapter state, claim state, scan scope, and next branch options, then stop at branch selection.
